sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: Trump-linked American Bitcoin's BTC holdings overtake Mike Novogratz’s Galaxy Digital
feed.summary: American Bitcoin (ABTC), a mining and treasury firm with ties to the Trump family, has surpassed Mike Novogratz’s Galaxy Digital in Bitcoin holdings, now holding 6,899 BTC. This makes ABTC the 16th largest public holder of Bitcoin, highlighting new entrants' growing influence in the crypto market. The company, which is a subsidiary of Hut 8 and has investors including Eric Trump and Donald Trump Jr., is doubling down on Bitcoin mining despite some firms shifting towards AI infrastructure.

feed.title: Graham Holdings
feed.summary: Graham Holdings (NYSE: GHC) is a company specializing in education and media services, with diverse segments including television broadcasting, manufacturing, and healthcare. Founded in 1877, it is headquartered in Arlington, VA, and is led by CEO Timothy J. O'Shaughnessy. The company's financial summary shows revenue of $4.9 billion as of November 2025, with a market capitalization of $4.63 billion and an annual dividend of $7.20 per share.

feed.title: Technical Analysis of Golden Heaven Group Holdings Ltd. (NASDAQ:GDHG)
feed.summary: This article provides a technical analysis of Golden Heaven Group Holdings Ltd. (NASDAQ:GDHG), offering an overview of indicators from moving averages, oscillators, and pivots for various timeframes. It also clarifies what technical ratings, pivots, oscillators, and moving averages mean within trading. The analysis notably suggests a "sell" rating for GDHG based on current market conditions and various timeframes.

feed.title: SLB shares rise 3.7% as investors focus on new subsea contract momentum and a firmer oilfield-services backdrop
feed.summary: SLB shares rose 3.7% today, driven by improving sentiment in oilfield services due to supportive crude prices and new contract wins in its subsea business. The company's OneSubsea joint venture secured a deepwater project offshore Malaysia, enhancing long-term revenue visibility. Additionally, recent analyst price target increases and plans to return over $4 billion to shareholders in 2026 further boosted investor confidence.

feed.title: Golar LNG jumps as Middle East LNG disruption fears lift gas-linked names
feed.summary: Golar LNG (GLNG) shares rose 3.1% due to increased concerns about LNG supply disruptions stemming from fresh attacks on Gulf energy infrastructure. The company benefits from rising global LNG prices and scarcity expectations, given its focus on floating LNG (FLNG) infrastructure. The positive movement is also supported by GLNG's strong liquidity and FLNG-focused backlog, which amplify its upside sensitivity in volatile commodity markets.

feed.title: McDonald's Franchisee Arcos Dorados Stock Slips - Here's Why
feed.summary: Arcos Dorados Holdings (NYSE: ARCO), the largest independent McDonald’s franchisee, saw its stock slip despite reporting strong Q4 2025 sales of $1.267 billion, which beat analyst expectations. However, the company's EPS of 12 cents missed the consensus of 20 cents, largely due to a $33.8 million net tax benefit in Brazil. Arcos Dorados reported significant growth in systemwide comparable sales and digital channel revenue, along with plans to open 105-115 new restaurants in 2026.

feed.title: AttoTude adopts Keysight signal analysis software for THz tech
feed.summary: AttoTude Inc. has integrated Keysight Technologies' 89600 Vector Signal Analysis software to advance its terahertz radio technology for AI data centers. Keysight, an S&P 500 company, has seen an 83% return over the past year due to increasing demand for test equipment in AI infrastructure, with analysts revising earnings upwards despite the stock trading above its fair value estimate. This collaboration highlights Keysight's continued innovation in design, emulation, and test solutions for high-speed communication and AI applications.

feed.title: T. ROWE PRICE AND OAK HILL ADVISORS LAUNCH MULTI-STRATEGY CREDIT INTERVAL FUND "OFLEX" FOR U.S. WEALTH CLIENTS
feed.summary: T. Rowe Price and Oak Hill Advisors (OHA) have launched the T. Rowe Price OHA Flexible Credit Income Fund ("OFLEX"), a multi-strategy credit interval fund for U.S. wealth clients. This new fund offers exposure to both public and private credit markets, aiming to provide flexibility and income generation through various market conditions. OFLEX is designed to expand access to OHA's alternative credit strategies and complements T. Rowe Price's growing suite of alternative investment offerings.

feed.title: Fifth Third Launches Small Towns & Small Cities Initiative to Advance Community & Economic Development
feed.summary: Fifth Third Bank has launched a new "Small Towns & Small Cities" initiative, choosing Lima, Ohio, as its first investment location. This four-year commitment will funnel capital, expertise, and partnerships into Lima to support local priorities in housing, small business, workforce development, and infrastructure. The initiative builds on the success of Fifth Third's Neighborhood Program, aiming to foster economic mobility and revitalization in communities historically affected by disinvestment.

feed.title: Ecolab Nears $5B Deal to Acquire KKR's Data-Center Cooling Firm
feed.summary: Ecolab is reportedly close to acquiring CoolIT Systems, KKR's data-center liquid-cooling business, for an estimated $4.5–5 billion. This potential acquisition signals a significant premium over CoolIT's earlier valuations and bolsters Ecolab’s strategy to expand its "Cooling-as-a-Service" offerings, especially for AI-driven infrastructure. The deal highlights the growing demand for energy-efficient, AI-optimized cooling solutions within the rapidly expanding data center sector.

feed.title: Investor Notice: Robbins LLP Informs Investors of the Gemini Space Station, Inc. Class Action Lawsuit
feed.summary: Robbins LLP has filed a class action lawsuit against Gemini Space Station, Inc. (NASDAQ: GEMI) on behalf of investors who purchased its stock pursuant to its September 12, 2025 IPO or between September 12, 2025, and February 17, 2026. The lawsuit alleges that Gemini's IPO documents misled investors by overstating the viability of its core business, its international expansion plans, and its financial prospects. Critical events leading to stock drops include a corporate pivot announcement ("Gemini 2.0") and the departure of key executives along with disappointing preliminary financial estimates.

feed.title: Assessing State Street’s Valuation After Upbeat Q1 Outlook And New ABS ETF Launch
feed.summary: State Street (STT) is discussed following an upbeat Q1 outlook and the launch of its new ABS ETF (PRAB). Despite recent positive news, the stock saw a slight dip over seven days but shows strong long-term returns. Simply Wall St estimates State Street to be undervalued by approximately 28%, trading at $121.09 against a narrative fair value of $144.30, attributed to its potential in fee and platform expansion.

feed.title: A Look At Applied Materials (AMAT) Valuation After New AI Memory R&D Pacts And Dividend Increase
feed.summary: Applied Materials (AMAT) has recently secured R&D collaborations with SK hynix and Micron for next-generation AI memory and approved a 15% dividend increase. Despite short-term share price cooling, long-term momentum remains strong with a 128.28% return over the past year. However, Simply Wall St's analysis suggests AMAT is overvalued at its current price of $349.47 against a fair value of $194.11, though its P/E ratio is lower than industry and peer averages.

feed.title: Ecolab Near Deal for KKR's Data-Center Cooling Company -- WSJ
feed.summary: Ecolab is reportedly close to acquiring a data-center cooling company from KKR. The article, sourced from the Wall Street Journal, also mentions Unity Software's Q4 earnings, which showed a revenue increase to $609 million but a quarterly loss of 66 cents per share.

feed.title: Why Did Newmont Stock Just Crash Below $100?
feed.summary: Newmont (NEM) stock has fallen below $100 for the first time since early January, retreating nearly 30% from its 52-week high. This crash is attributed to a significant sell-off in gold, which plummeted over 5% following the Federal Reserve's decision to keep interest rates unchanged amidst surging oil prices and inflation fears, increasing the opportunity cost of holding gold. Despite the current volatility, investors are advised against panic-selling due to Newmont's strong financial footing, while potential buyers might consider waiting for market stabilization.

feed.title: Is Global-E Online Ltd. (GLBE) A Good Stock To Buy Now?
feed.summary: This article analyzes a bullish thesis on Global-E Online Ltd. (GLBE) from Compounding Your Wealth’s Substack. It highlights GLBE's strong Q3 2025 performance, including significant increases in GMV, revenue, and free cash flow, along with an expanding business moat due to complex international regulations. Despite a recent stock depreciation, the article suggests GLBE presents a compelling growth story in cross-border DTC infrastructure.

feed.title: Eastman updates views on chemical recycling during a period of great change
feed.summary: Eastman Chemical Co. has updated its perspectives on chemical recycling amidst significant industry shifts. The article, authored by Jim Johnson and published on March 19, 2026, also briefly mentions related industry news such as price increases in various plastics and legal actions concerning pellet pollution.

feed.title: Arthur J. Gallagher & Co Aktie: Wells Fargo cuts price target amid analyst reassessment
feed.summary: Wells Fargo has lowered its price target for Arthur J. Gallagher & Co (NYSE: AJG) to $273 from $298, while maintaining an overweight rating. This adjustment reflects a more cautious near-term outlook for the Chicago-based insurance brokerage, despite a generally constructive broader analyst consensus. The move signals potential margin pressure, slower organic growth, or higher integration costs, prompting investors to closely monitor the sector's dynamics and Gallagher's execution strategy.

feed.title: Tesla faces escalated safety probe over ‘full-self driving’
feed.summary: US auto safety regulators have escalated their investigation into Tesla's "Full-Self Driving" system, citing additional crashes related to the technology's ability to handle reduced visibility conditions. The National Highway Traffic Safety Administration (NHTSA) upgraded its probe to an engineering analysis after reviewing incidents where the system failed to detect and warn drivers about degraded camera visibility. This increased scrutiny could lead to a recall and impacts Tesla's future autonomous driving ambitions, as nine crashes are now linked to the automated system, up from four.

feed.title: Hasbro opens 600,000-square-foot warehouse as it prepares to leave Rhode Island
feed.summary: Hasbro has unveiled a new 600,000 square-foot distribution center in Midway, Georgia, serving as its first U.S. warehouse fully developed, leased, and branded by the company. This move comes as Hasbro prepares for its departure from Rhode Island. The article also references related news about Pawtucket preparing for Hasbro's exodus and the toy maker's digital gaming unit's performance.

feed.title: Can Firefly Aerospace’s (FLY) Alpha Block II Success Reframe Its Reliability And Avionics Narrative?
feed.summary: Firefly Aerospace's Alpha Flight 7 mission successfully launched, achieving orbital insertion and validating Block II upgrades like in-house avionics and enhanced thermal protection. This success is a critical proof point for improving reliability after a previous failure and impacts its investment narrative, especially with upcoming Q4 2025 earnings. Investors are watching if the company's revenue guidance and credit facility are sufficient to support ongoing losses and upgrades as they push for a higher launch cadence.

feed.title: Is AES Stock Underperforming the Dow?
feed.summary: The AES Corporation (AES) is a large-cap global power generation and utility company. While its shares have declined 19.9% from its 52-week high, AES has outperformed the Dow Jones Industrials Average ($DOWI) over the past three months and year-to-date, despite slightly lagging its 52-week return. Analysts currently hold a consensus "Hold" rating on AES stock.

feed.title: When Things Go Wrong With A Commerce Task, Many Consumers Will Blame The Answer Engine
feed.summary: A Forrester survey across US, UK, and Canada indicates that over two out of five consumers would blame the answer engine itself if issues arise during commerce-related tasks, even over the brand or their own prompts. This suggests that as agentic commerce evolves, platforms offering native checkout experiences must address fundamental commerce requirements like inventory, delivery, and post-purchase support. Otherwise, answer engines will continue to face consumer expectations of responsibility for the full customer experience.

feed.title: Final Trades: Okta, Phillips 66 and the IYH
feed.summary: The Investment Committee suggests their top stock picks for the latter half of the market day, featuring Okta, Phillips 66, and the IYH. The article includes a short video discussing these "Final Trades."

feed.title: Costco to personalize online display ads at moment of product selection
feed.summary: Costco is launching "Reserved Display," a new onsite ad format for its retail media network, Costco Velocity, in partnership with Moloco. This feature will use machine learning to personalize online display ads for members at the moment of product selection, acting as "digital end caps." The goal is to match the right products to the right customers to drive sales, with a beta launch planned for Q2 2026.

feed.title: FedEx Corp stock slips 1% ahead of third quarter earnings
feed.summary: FedEx Corp. stock experienced a 1% dip ahead of its fiscal third-quarter earnings release, closing at $349.74 on Wednesday. The company's shares had previously surged, reaching a record high in February, but have since dropped due to investor concerns over the US-Iran conflict and rising petroleum costs. Analysts anticipate a 6% increase in quarterly revenue to $23.5 billion, despite a projected 7% contraction in adjusted earnings per share to $4.17.

feed.title: 3M and Bain will buy fire and rescue firm for nearly $2B in joint venture
feed.summary: 3M and Bain Capital are forming a joint venture to acquire Madison Fire & Rescue for $1.95 billion, with 3M's Scott Safety unit becoming part of the new entity. 3M will own 50.1% of the venture and will receive $700 million at closing. This deal broadens 3M's safety portfolio and comes after 3M's earlier acquisition of Scott Safety in 2017 and its recent efforts to spin off its healthcare business and address PFAS litigation.

feed.title: Coca-Cola HBC grants performance share awards to senior executives
feed.summary: Coca-Cola HBC has awarded nil-cost performance share awards to its senior executives, including the CEO, CFO, and COO, under its Stock Option and Performance Share Award Plan. These awards, based on a reference price of £44.62 per share, will vest over a three-year performance period, with some requiring an additional two-year holding period. This move aims to align management incentives with long-term shareholder value and retain key leaders through equity-based compensation.

feed.title: Keysight and AttoTude Collaborate on Advanced Signal Analysis Solutions for THz Interconnect Development
feed.summary: Keysight Technologies announced that AttoTude Inc., a provider of terahertz (THz) interconnect technology for AI and hyperscale data centers, has adopted Keysight's enhanced 89600 Vector Signal Analysis (VSA) software. This collaboration aims to accelerate the development of AttoTude's THz radio technology, which addresses bandwidth, reliability, and energy efficiency challenges in AI infrastructure with data rates up to 225 Gbaud. The enhanced software, along with Keysight’s UXR Oscilloscope, provides critical tools for characterizing high-speed waveforms, improving signal analysis, and speeding up innovation in THz communications.

feed.title: Keysight and AttoTude Collaborate on Advanced Signal Analysis Solutions for THz Interconnect Development
feed.summary: Keysight Technologies and AttoTude Inc. are collaborating to advance THz interconnect development for AI data centers. AttoTude is utilizing enhancements to Keysight’s 89600 Vector Signal Analysis software and UXR Oscilloscope to accelerate the characterization of its THz radio technology, which operates at frequencies up to 1 THz with high data rates. This partnership enables more efficient and reliable validation of AttoTude's innovative solutions designed to meet the growing demands of AI infrastructure.

feed.title: Exxon says FPSO for fifth Guyana offshore oil and gas project 'almost complete' (XOM:NYSE)
feed.summary: Exxon Mobil's head in Guyana, Alistair Routledge, announced that the Errea Wittu floating production facility for the consortium's fifth offshore oil and gas project in Guyana is "almost complete." The facility is expected to depart from Singapore soon. This development signals continued progress in Exxon's significant investments in the region.

feed.title: Citi Gave £100 Million Credit Line to Lender Backed by MFS’ Raja
feed.summary: Citigroup extended a £100 million credit line to Interbridge Mortgages, a UK lender backed by Paresh Raja, whose other company, Market Financial Solutions Ltd., was facing collapse. The funding agreement was made in January to support Interbridge's expansion.

feed.title: TE Connectivity Acquires Charging Inlet Assets From Phoenix Contact
feed.summary: TE Connectivity has acquired the EV charging inlet manufacturing segment of Phoenix Contact E-Mobility GmbH. This acquisition allows TE Connectivity to expand its role in the electric vehicle market, particularly in vehicle-side charging inlet components, as Phoenix Contact exits the automotive sector. The deal is expected to enhance TE Connectivity's product portfolio, support its growth objectives in e-mobility, and contribute to revenue by fiscal year 2026.

feed.title: Adi Sfadia Sells 48,978 Shares of Gilat Satellite Networks (NASDAQ:GILT) Stock
feed.summary: Gilat Satellite Networks (NASDAQ:GILT) CEO Adi Sfadia sold 48,978 shares of the company's stock on March 18, 2026, for a total of $825,279.30. The company recently reported strong quarterly earnings, beating analyst expectations with $0.20 EPS and $136.96 million in revenue. Despite institutional investors increasing their holdings, analysts have a "Moderate Buy" rating with an average target price of $20.00.

feed.title: Aflac (NYSE:AFL) Major Shareholder Sells $1,723,389.00 in Stock
feed.summary: A major shareholder of Aflac (NYSE:AFL), Post Holdings Co. Ltd. Japan, sold 15,700 shares on March 17th for $1,723,389, reducing its ownership by 0.03%. This sale is part of a larger trend of the shareholder selling approximately 143,800 shares totaling $15.8 million between March 5th and March 17th, although they still retain over 52 million shares valued at $5.72 billion. Aflac recently missed quarterly earnings expectations with $1.57 EPS and $4.28 billion in revenue, leading to an average analyst "Hold" rating and a target price of $111.73.

feed.title: Kroger Nationwide Recall Update: Customers Issued Warnings Over Products
feed.summary: Kroger has issued several recalls in 2026 for both food and non-food items due to risks such as undeclared allergens, potential Salmonella contamination, and foreign material. The recalls include specific Red Bird Farms products for undeclared sesame, Navitas Organics products for Salmonella, and Ajinomoto Foods items for glass contamination. Customers are advised to not use or consume recalled products and return them for a refund.

feed.title: T-Mobile and Mint Mobile tops in J.D. Power experience study
feed.summary: A new J.D. Power study reveals that customers prefer mobile apps over websites for telecom interactions due to easier logins, largely thanks to biometric authentication. T-Mobile led in overall customer satisfaction among internet service providers, while Mint Mobile ranked highest among mobile providers. The study highlights the need for telecom companies to improve website functionality and maintain consistent digital experiences across all channels.

feed.title: Stryker cyberattack delays surgeries for some patients
feed.summary: A cyberattack on Stryker, a medical device company, has reportedly caused delays for some patients awaiting surgeries. The article, by Ike Swetlitz and Miquéla V Thornton, highlights the impact of the attack on healthcare operations. This incident underscores the growing concern about cybersecurity in the medical device sector.

feed.title: British Columbia Debt Downgraded Again on ‘Entrenched’ Deficit
feed.summary: Moody's Ratings has downgraded British Columbia's debt again, citing an "entrenched" deficit and worsening fiscal position for Canada's third-most populous province. This marks the latest in a series of downgrades, with the bond ratings agency lowering its long-term issuer and senior unsecured debt rating to Aa2 from Aa1. Moody's highlighted a deterioration in long-term fiscal management as the primary reason for the downgrade.

feed.title: Netflix stock drops 3.06% as technical signals remain mixed and sentiment weakens
feed.summary: Netflix (NFLX) stock dropped 3.06% to $91.83, hovering just above its short-term moving averages but significantly below its long-term average, indicating persistent long-term bearish pressure despite short-term stabilization. While the company has seen strategic wins like scaling its ad-supported tier and launching live sports streaming, and institutional investment from Danske Bank, mixed technical signals and institutional selling (MRP Capital Investments) contribute to a complex outlook. Analysts suggest further downside risk, with a trading range adjusted to $89.00–$94.00, and a bearish scenario if the price falls below $87.60.

feed.title: FingerMotion: Share Exchange Deal To Acquire Telecom Provider Telforge
feed.summary: FingerMotion, a mobile services and technology company, announced a share exchange agreement to acquire Telforge, Inc., a cloud voice and messaging solutions provider. The deal involves issuing up to 7.33 million shares of FingerMotion common stock to Telforge shareholders, with a portion contingent on performance-based earnout milestones. This acquisition aims to expand FingerMotion's geographical reach, enhance its service portfolio, and manage high volumes of telecommunications traffic without significant additional capital investment.

feed.title: Alpha Buying: Quiet Insider Conviction in a Noisy Market
feed.summary: Despite market uncertainty and lukewarm financial reports, a director at Global Water Resources (NASDAQ:GWRS) recently invested $130,000 of his own money into the company. This "alpha buying" signal suggests insider confidence in the company's long-term value, as it is in an investment cycle for infrastructure expansion in a high-growth region. While the market focuses on macro-economic noise, the insider's action points to a belief in future earnings once regulatory approvals for rate increases are secured.

feed.title: Grove Collaborative and Oceanic Preservation Society Launch The Unplastic Shop to Help Consumers Reduce Plastic Exposure at Home
feed.summary: Grove Collaborative has partnered with the Oceanic Preservation Society (OPS) to launch "The Unplastic Shop," an online destination offering curated products and educational content to help consumers reduce plastic exposure in their daily lives. The initiative highlights the health impacts of microplastics and plastic-associated chemicals, which have been found in human organs. The shop features approximately 500 vetted products that meet strict criteria, focusing on high-frequency household routines and aiming to provide consumers with practical, healthier alternatives.

feed.title: CIBC raises its price target on Endeavour Silver Corp. (EXK) to C$25 and keeps an outperformer rating
feed.summary: CIBC has increased its price target for Endeavour Silver Corp. (EXK) to C$25, maintaining an "outperformer" rating on the stock. This adjustment reflects CIBC's positive outlook on the company's financial prospects and market position.

feed.title: iShares MSCI Emerging Markets Asia ETF (NASDAQ: EEMA) - Share Price
feed.summary: This article provides detailed share price information for iShares MSCI Emerging Markets Asia ETF (NASDAQ: EEMA), including its current price of $98.41 and recent performance data. It outlines price movements over the current year, last year, and financial years, alongside a historical daily share price table. The data highlights EEMA's stock performance and volume over various periods.

feed.title: Can KDP Sustain Its Growth Amid Cost Pressures & Coffee Headwinds?
feed.summary: Keurig Dr Pepper (KDP) demonstrated strong international performance in Q4 2025, with net sales increasing 15.1% on a constant-currency basis due to pricing and volume gains, particularly in Mexico and Canada. Despite this, the stock has underperformed, declining 4.1% in the past three months. KDP currently trades at an attractive valuation, with a forward 12-month P/E ratio of 11.68X, suggesting it might be a value play.

feed.title: 3 AgTech & Food Innovation Picks Riding on Structural Growth Trends
feed.summary: The agricultural technology (AgTech) and food innovation sector is an attractive investment theme driven by long-term demand for productivity and sustainability. Companies like Archer-Daniels-Midland (ADM), Ingredion (INGR), and Beyond Meat (BYND) are at the forefront, addressing evolving consumer preferences, ingredient innovation, and agricultural efficiency. The article highlights how these companies are adapting to trends in plant-based proteins, clean-label ingredients, and advanced farming technologies.

feed.title: Biogen Targets Pediatric MS Growth With New Phase 3 Fumarate Study
feed.summary: Biogen (BIIB) has initiated a new Phase 3 clinical trial to evaluate the safety and efficacy of diroximel fumarate and dimethyl fumarate for treating relapsing forms of multiple sclerosis in pediatric patients. This study aims to provide a child-friendly oral treatment option and reinforce Biogen's long-term presence in the MS market, particularly as older products face generic competition. The trial, while not expected to impact short-term revenue, is a strategic move to potentially expand label indications and support the company's MS portfolio against rivals like Novartis's Gilenya.

feed.title: TD Cowen Adjusts JM Smucker (SJM) Price Target to $113, Maintains Hold Rating | SJM Stock News
feed.summary: TD Cowen analyst Robert Moskow has lowered the price target for JM Smucker (SJM) from $124 to $113 but maintained a 'Hold' rating. This adjustment reflects the analyst's re-evaluation of the company's valuation and market conditions. Despite this, other analysts have recently upgraded or raised price targets for SJM, and the average one-year price target from 15 analysts suggests a 24.04% upside from the current price.

feed.title: Royal Caribbean to add private South Pacific island to Australia cruises
feed.summary: Royal Caribbean Group is adding its first exclusive Southern Hemisphere destination, Royal Beach Club Lelepa in Vanuatu, to Australia cruises starting October 2027. This new private island will feature two beaches, ten bars, various water activities, and a nature trail, with all-inclusive menus. It will be part of itineraries sailing from Brisbane and Sydney on the Voyager of the Seas and Anthem of the Seas, respectively.
